templateOptions.label: ClientID
templateOptions.description: The ClientID for the Ysis SCIM API.

templateOptions.label: ClientSecret
templateOptions.description: The ClientSecret for the Ysis SCIM API.

templateOptions.label: BaseUrl
templateOptions.description: The URL to the Ysis environment. [https://tools4ever.acceptatie1.ysis.nl/um/api]

templateOptions.label: AuthenticationUrl
templateOptions.description: The URI to retrieve the oAuth token. Like [https://tools4ever.acceptatie1.ysis.nl/cas/oauth/token]

templateOptions.label: To
templateOptions.description: The 'To' Email Address of the Administrator. Who needs to be informed when a discipline update takes place.

templateOptions.label: SmtpServerAddress
templateOptions.description: The URL of the Exchange Server
